description: Wontopos (WOS) long-term memory (beta) - one memory across Claude Code, Cursor, and your agents.
name: com.wontopos/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Wontopos API key (wos-live-...). Create one in the console at wontopos.com.
environmentVariables.name: WONTOPOS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default store for every tool call (default: "default").
environmentVariables.name: WONTOPOS_USER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Engine to read with: tablet-1 (default) or scroll-1.
environmentVariables.name: WONTOPOS_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for read-only mode: recall/search/list_memories/engram/stats only, no write or delete tools.
environmentVariables.name: WONTOPOS_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to let tools take a user_id argument (multi-store). Default: every call is pinned to WONTOPOS_USER_ID.
environmentVariables.name: WONTOPOS_ALLOW_STORE_OVERRIDE
